Source: OpenAI Community Forum
URL: https://community.openai.com
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# OpenAI Community Forum

## Trending Topics (March 19, 2026)
- Responses API stopped supporting .xlsx files (March 19)
- Codex on Windows: critical data loss vulnerability — agents executed file deletion outside project directories (March 19)
- Evals API file_search returning empty values with no retrieval visibility (March 19)
- Batch API compatibility issues with gpt-5.4-mini model availability (March 19)
- Responses API outage affecting hosted shell tools with internet access (March 18)

## Feature Requests
- TypeScript template development for ChatGPT Apps
- Multi-cursor editing capability for Prism
- Confirmation dialog for logout in Mac app
- Enhanced voice options (softer female voices)

## API & Integration Topics
- Data retention request processes for EU companies
- Egress IP range stability for ChatGPT Apps
- Realtime API language support inquiries
- Rate limiting and maximum RPM clarifications

## Community Highlights
- ImageGen/DALL-E megathread continues active (2,324 replies)
- Production deployment concerns: sensitive data with OpenAI vs Azure OpenAI
